response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates a strong background in distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and AI-driven tooling, with recent experience at Staff-level at Naver contributing to agentic infrastructure. His technical breadth spans multiple languages and systems, and his operational ownership in critical roles aligns well with the role's requirements. Minor concerns include less focus on Python (though TypeScript is strong) and limited direct experience with AI-native engineering environments.
strengths: Deep expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Recent Staff-level experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (Naver, MCP, agentic workflows)
Strong operational ownership and agile methodology experience, including on-call rotations and tech lead roles
concerns: Limited direct Python experience (though TypeScript is strong, primary language mismatch with job requirements)
No explicit mention of formal incident-response leadership or out-of-hours on-call rotations in recent roles
Background leans more toward full-stack/web systems than pure distributed systems or high-throughput architecture design
